name: Focus Reader for ADHD
description: Read long web pages in focused, section-by-section steps. Optional AI reading guide with clear privacy disclosure.

name: Inline Currency Converter
description: Instantly see currency amounts (EUR, USD, JPY, KRW and more) converted to your chosen currency as tooltips — live rates, no clicks needed.

name: Shadowing Master
description: The ultimate shadowing practice app for language learning. Combines source audio and your voice into a single file for easy submission.

name: Vlooming
description: Real-time meeting health analysis. Tracks speaking time, turn-taking balance, and participation equity — all processed locally on your device.
